description_long: This object is a polygonal, cylindrical barrel with a faceted blue body and a dark, octagonal lid. The top features a metallic mesh or grille, bordered by red and black angular accents, giving it a modern, industrial look. The body is vertically elongated, with a slightly tapered base and top, and the surface appears smooth and matte. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the lid seems securely attached, possibly non-removable. The color scheme is dominated by deep blue, with contrasting red and black details on the upper section. Its robust, utilitarian design suggests it could be used for storage or as a waste receptacle in urban environments.
description: A faceted blue barrel with a dark, angular lid and red accents, featuring a metallic mesh on top. The design is modern and industrial, with no visible handles.
description_view_0: The blue barrel is seen from the side, showing the dark lid with a metallic mesh and subtle red accents.
description_view_1: This view highlights the red angular section of the lid, with the blue body and black top clearly visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the blue body and dark lid with mesh are prominent, with red accents partially visible.
description_view_3: The red section of the lid is most visible, contrasting with the blue body and black top.
